Author: BlueWaveXIV
Name: AutoList
Description: AutoList turns retainer Market Board chores into supervised AutoList, AutoRefresh, and AutoTidy workflows with a small in-game tray that lights up when your character is ready to start.
Punchline: Turn retainer listing from market-board chore into one-click momentum.
Changelog:
Changed AutoList and AutoRefresh pricing to match market-board quality by default: HQ listings price against HQ competitors, and NQ listings price against NQ competitors.
Added a Let HQ undercut NQ pricing toggle for deliberately pricing HQ listings against cheaper NQ listings too.
Kept own-retainer filtering in place before choosing the competitor price to undercut.
